mission_brief.title: Checkout Conversion Drop
mission_brief.problem: Late-January completed orders have softened across key Indian metros while major competitors continue to hold steady.
mission_brief.objective: Investigate ZaikaNow's drop in orders by querying analytics, UX research, and engineering teammates. Build an evidence-backed root-cause analysis and recommend a recovery plan.
notes: Each teammate sees only their own operational domain.
Strong answers cross-reference evidence instead of relying on a single agent.
User attributes like city, platform, and user_type live in the users table. JOIN to users when analyzing orders, payments, or reviews by these dimensions.
The data spans Oct 2024 to Mar 2025, covering baseline, a promotional period, disruption, partial recovery, and downstream effects.

sources.name: users
sources.description: Customer profiles. This is the single source of truth for city, platform, and user_type. JOIN other tables to users via user_id to get these dimensions.

fields.name: city
fields.description: Home metro: bengaluru / mumbai / delhi_ncr / hyderabad / pune / chennai.

fields.name: signup_date
fields.description: Date the customer first signed up.

sources.name: orders
sources.description: Order attempts with status and amount. JOIN to users for city/platform/user_type. session_id links to funnel_events sessions.

fields.name: driver_id
fields.description: Foreign key to drivers. Assigned for completed orders, empty for failed/cancelled.

fields.name: session_id
fields.description: Session that originated this order. S-prefix = funnel session, QR-prefix = quick reorder.

sources.name: payments
sources.description: Payment attempts with method, provider, status, and processing time. JOIN to orders then users for city/platform.

fields.name: session_id
fields.description: Session identifier, copied from parent order.

fields.name: error_code
fields.description: Error code when payment does not complete cleanly.

sources.name: restaurants
sources.description: Restaurant listings with cuisine type and location.

sources.name: menu_items
sources.description: Menu items with prices, linked to restaurants.

sources.name: drivers
sources.description: Delivery driver roster with availability status.

sources.name: funnel_events
sources.description: Session-level product events for browse-to-order funnel analysis. Platform is per-session (a user may use different devices). JOIN to users for city and user_type.

fields.name: event_type
fields.description: app_open / restaurant_view / add_to_cart / checkout_start / payment_attempt / order_complete.

fields.name: platform
fields.description: Device platform for this session: ios / android / web.

sources.name: reviews
sources.description: Customer reviews with ratings and free-text feedback. JOIN to users via user_id for city/platform context.

sources.name: support_tickets
sources.description: Support tickets with issue category and priority. JOIN to users for city/platform.

fields.name: order_id
fields.description: Foreign key to orders (may be empty).

fields.name: category
fields.description: Ticket category: payment, checkout, delivery, promo, account.

fields.name: subcategory
fields.description: Specific issue: upi_timeout, money_debited, retry_missing, trust_concern, etc.

sources.name: usability_study.md
sources.description: Moderated usability research notes (n=24, Jan 22-28, 2025) focused on checkout and UPI reliability.

sources.name: ux_changelog
sources.description: Recent UX changes, experiments, and bugfixes. Platform here refers to the change target, not the user.

fields.name: affected_area
fields.description: Product area: homepage, cart, checkout, search.

fields.name: platform
fields.description: Target platform for the change: all / android / ios / web.

sources.name: deployments
sources.description: Deployment history with service, description, author, and rollback availability.

sources.name: service_metrics
sources.description: Daily service latency and error-rate metrics.

sources.name: error_log
sources.description: Row-per-error detail log across services. Includes payment errors with session/order tracing, plus non-payment service errors (search, notification).

fields.name: error_code
fields.description: Error code: UPI_CALLBACK_TIMEOUT, PAYMENT_PROVIDER_ERROR, SEARCH_INDEX_TIMEOUT, etc.

sources.name: system_architecture.md
sources.description: System topology, payment path, and operational architecture notes.

glossary.definition: Share of sessions that ultimately complete an order.
A delayed or missing payment confirmation after the customer approves the transaction in the banking app.
High-frequency customer segment with repeat ordering behavior.
The apparent order drop when a promotional campaign ends and volume reverts to baseline.
Behavioral change where users reduce ordering frequency due to loss of confidence after experiencing failures, even after the technical issue is resolved.
